name: Urban Landscape Design
consequences: Immediate: Unique cityscape → Systemic: Increased player engagement → Strategic: Enhanced brand reputation
options: Gotham City-inspired dark alleys and towering skyscrapers
A sprawling, modern metropolis with sleek architecture and vibrant street art
A post-apocalyptic wasteland with crumbling infrastructure and makeshift settlements
review: Controls Artistic Freedom vs. Commercial Viability. Weakness: The options fail to consider the impact on game development timelines.

name: Criminal Economy Model
consequences: Immediate: Realistic crime economy → Systemic: Increased player investment → Strategic: Enhanced game replay value
options: A complex, dynamic system with multiple factions and economies
A simplified, intuitive model with clear goals and objectives
An emergent, AI-driven system that adapts to player behavior
review: Controls Complexity vs. Accessibility. Weakness: The options fail to consider the impact on game balance and fairness.

name: Procedural Generation
consequences: Immediate: Increased world variety → Systemic: Improved player engagement → Strategic: Enhanced brand reputation
options: A robust, algorithm-driven system with diverse environments and scenarios
A moderate, statistically-driven approach with some variation and randomness
A minimalist, hand-crafted approach with limited procedural generation
review: Controls Creativity vs. Consistency. Weakness: The options fail to consider the impact on game stability and performance.

name: Multplayer Mode
consequences: Immediate: Enhanced replay value → Systemic: Increased player engagement → Strategic: Enhanced brand reputation
options: A competitive, ranked multiplayer mode with leaderboards and rewards
A cooperative, team-based mode with shared objectives and challenges
An emergent, AI-driven mode that adapts to player behavior
review: Controls Competition vs. Cooperation. Weakness: The options fail to consider the impact on game balance and fairness.

review: Controls Autonomy vs. Exposure. Weakness: The options fail to consider the impact on game development timelines and budgets.
